arbiter_reasoning: Bear prevails. Agent 3 is in_line at +3.33%, so there is no meaningful consensus edge, while Agent 4 is only partially novel and mixes one credible positive catalyst (CEO buy/analyst upside) against two concrete negatives: lower profit and expected production hit from winter storm. Agent 2's stable drilling and favorable WTI help the base case, but not enough to offset the operational/headline risks, so this stays below the trading threshold.
